description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden desk with a natural light wood finish. The front side features a set of four drawers on the left and a double-door cabinet on the right, both with simple, flat faces and no visible handles. The back side is plain, with two sliding panels, one of which has a circular cutout, likely for cable management or ventilation. The top surface is broad and flat, providing ample workspace. The sides are solid panels, with the left side showing the drawer outlines and the right side appearing smooth. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, functional piece suitable for professional or administrative environments.
description: A spacious, light wood desk with drawers and a cabinet on the front, and sliding panels on the back. The design is clean, sturdy, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers on the left and a double-door cabinet on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid panel and the outlines of the drawers.
description_view_2: Back view with two sliding panels, one featuring a circular cutout.
description_view_3: Right side view with a smooth, solid panel and no visible features.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features drawers on the left and a cabinet on the right, indicating this is the front; the back has sliding panels for access or cable management.
